# PHIL.088 ? Nihilism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** nihilism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Rejection of objective meaning and values; existential vacuum; death of God; radical skepticism; meaninglessness

## Application
Recognize absence of inherent meaning; reject objective values; existential honesty; confronting meaninglessness; radical questioning

## Key Values
- Meaninglessness
- Value rejection
- Radical skepticism
- Existential void

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, nihilism
